violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed several employees applying gloves without wash hands prior.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Observed clean storage lids on shelf with dirty paper towels used to clean tea containers.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed floors having a build up of food debris around floor edges and under equipment.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
